title: Rename device - new name in FMD
scenario: Verify that renaming a device in Settings/Rename updates the device name in the Find My Device list.
steps: 2. Navigate to the 'Rename' option (likely under General > About or similar).
3. Rename the device to a new name.
4. Open the Find My Device (FMD) app or website.
5. Check the device list for the renamed device.
6. Observe the displayed name of the device.
expected: The new name is displayed in the Find My Device (FMD) list instead of the previous name.
